sourceMovie.title: Grimsby
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Grimsby for the same reason it broke through in 2016: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Louis Leterrier keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: 22 Jump Street
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Grimsby clicked for you, 22 Jump Street (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Grimsby?
faq.answer: Try 22 Jump Street, Bad Boys: Ride or Die, Ride Along—each shares DNA with Grimsby while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Grimsby?
faq.answer: Grimsby (2016) is best described as Action, Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Grimsby worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
